ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the algorithmic problem */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of successful submissions */,
  "average_runtime" REAL /* Average runtime of accepted solutions */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the problem on the LeetCode platform */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the problem was added to the platform */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the problem details were last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the problem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "example_input" TEXT /* Example input for the problem */,
  "example_output" TEXT /* Example output for the problem */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Constraints for the problem */,
  "solution_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_difficulty FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty") REFERENCES difficulty_levels ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "github_link" TEXT /* Link to the user's GitHub profile */,
  "linked_in_link" TEXT /* Link to the user's LinkedIn profile */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the attempt */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem attempted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attempt (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the user's solution */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "code_snippet" TEXT /* Snippet of the code submitted */,
  "test_cases_passed" INTEGER /* Number of test cases passed */,
  "test_cases_failed" INTEGER /* Number of test cases failed */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the solution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempts_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion post */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being discussed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the discussion */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion post */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the post has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the post has received */,
  "parent_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent post if this is a reply */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the post is sticky (pinned to the top) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user on the problem */,
  "last_attempt_date" TEXT /* Date of the last attempt made by the user */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made by the user for the problem */,
  "best_runtime" REAL /* Best runtime achieved by the user for the problem */,
  "best_memory_usage" REAL /* Best memory usage achieved by the user for the problem */,
  "improvement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the user's improvement over time for the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_performance_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended problem */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has completed the recommended problem */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the user completed the recommended problem */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tags_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)
